author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. Wired stream.rs module into lib.rs (was orphaned — existed but not declared)
2. Modified GpuDevice::stream() to call current_stream_or_default() — checks thread-local stream first, falls back to default. ALL existing kernel code is now stream-aware automatically.
3. Added GpuDevice::default_stream() for code that explicitly needs the device's default stream
4. Fixed circular reference: current_stream_or_default() now calls default_stream() not stream()
5. Added GpuBackend::synchronize() and stream_count() to expose stream APIs at ferrotorch-core level
6. Fixed blas.rs device_ptr calls for new Arc<CudaStream> return type
7. StreamPool (8 streams/device), StreamGuard, CudaEventWrapper were already complete — now reachable
8. 807 core + 250 optim + 193 gpu tests pass
